case_title: IN RE: WEDBUSH MORGAN SECURITIES, INC.

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION TO QUASH SERVICE OF PETITION OF WEBBUSH MORGAN SECURITIES, INC. TO CORRECT ARBITRATION AWARD AND CONFIRM AS CORRECTED FILED BY PETITIONER WEDBUSH MORGAN SECURITIES, INC.
ORDER GRANTING RESPONDENTS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE
PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER WEDBUSH MORGAN SECURITIES, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT LE, DIEP Q LE, TAM M

LAW AND MOTION 301, RESPONDENT DIEP LE AND TAM LE'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF PETITION OF WEDBUSH MORGAN SECURITIES,INC. TO CORRECT ARBITRATION AWARD AND CONFIRM AS CORRECTED -- GRANTED. ANY CIVIL ACTION MUST BE COMMENCED WITH THE FILING OF A COMPLAINT OR PETITION AND SUMMONS MUST ISSUE TO REQUIRE A RESPONSE. SUMMONS AND COMPLAINTS MUST BE PERSONALLY SERVED ON NO MATTER HOW WELL LITIGANTS KNOW EACH OTHER, AND CANNOT BE SERVED ON AN ATTORNEY UNTIL THAT ATTORNEY HAS APPEARED FOR LITIGANT. $465 OF COSTS AWARDED TO RESPONDENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CARLOS BEA REPORTER: PATTY LEE DUBBLE, CSR#3058

calendar.matters:
Motion To Quash Service Of Petition Of Wedbush Morgan Securities,Inc. To Correct Arbitration Award And Confirm As Corrected
Off Calendar Jul-29-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
COURTROOM APPEARANCE:
Timothy A. Canning, Esq., 707/442-3064, for respondents Diep Q. Le and Tam M. Le, moving to quash service of petition

COURTCALL APPEARANCE:
Gary Holmes, Esq. of Wedbush Morgan Security, Inc. 213/688-8016, for petitioner and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- RESPONDENT DIEP LE and TAM LE'S Motion To Quash Service Of Petition Of Wedbush Morgan Securities,Inc. To Correct Arbitration Award And Confirm As Corrected -- GRANTED. ANY CIVIL ACTION MUST BE COMMENCED WITH THE FILING OF A COMPLAINT OR PETITION AND SUMMONS MUST ISSUE TO REQUIRE A RESPONSE. SUMMONS AND COMPLAINTS MUST BE PERSONALLY SERVED ON NO MATTER HOW WELL LITIGANTS KNOW EACH OTHER, AND CANNOT BE SERVED ON AN ATTORNEY UNTIL THAT ATTORNEY HAS APPEARED FOR LITIGANT. $465 of costs awarded to respondent. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (CB/301/ROB-X) Reporter: Patty Lee Dubble, CSR #3058
